title: paeonia × dmitrievae
intro: Paeonia × dmitrievae, a hybrid peony species, is a type of flowering plant known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant's roots and flowers have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues, due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Paeonia × dmitrievae include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
